claims.claim: Fallback texture terms should be weighted by current entropy/pressure rather than behaving like a static canned vocabulary.
claims.evidence_plan: Link `fallback_texture_term_probabilities_v1`, `fallback_dynamic_texture_bias_v1`, and fallback texture weighting tests.

claims.claim: Fallback should preserve high-entropy `shadow-v3` texture instead of collapsing into generic assistant prose.
claims.evidence_plan: Link fallback prompt/continuity-budget tests and fallback fire-drill surface.

claims.claim: Changing fallback model/provider selection based on entropy or pressure would alter live fallback authority.
claims.evidence_plan: Record model-selection boundary: pressure changes texture budget, not model selection, without Mike/operator approval.
